title.description: Title of the stakeholder position on the board (e.g. CFO)

isIndependent.description: Whether the company board appointment is an independent

isDirector.description: Whether the company board appointment is a director

isOfficer.description: Whether the company board appointment is an officer

dateAppointed.description: Date of appointment for the company board appointment

dateApproved.description: Date of approval for the company board appointment

dateTerminated.description: Date of termination for the company board appointment

note.description: Notes for the company board appointment
